---
title: "👁️ Attention"
listing-page: true
listing:
  contents: .
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, depth, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    depth: "Depth"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Scaled dot-product attention, multi-head splits, cross-attention, and masking — derived from one idea instead of memorized as a formula.
